productDisplayName: Fossil Men Walter Traveller Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from genuine leather, this Walter Traveller wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 9 cm x 11 cmOne main compartment on a herringbone patterned upper with stitch detailing and brand labelTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideA flap on the left side with id holders on both sidesFour card holder slots under the flap and on the right sideBranding label on the innerCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
